transcript.text:
(There were guys who were desperate to see Tzuyang...)
(Kwak Beom & Lee Chang-ho Bbangsongguk on the scene!) Can we come in?!
Wow!
(※ They're not Mad Monster ※) Wow, it's Tzuyang!
(We should say things in their way for today) I'm Lee Chang-ho
I'm Kwak Beom
- Tzu - & yang!
(& lol)
(Today's dish with Mad Monster... No, it's Bbangsongguk)
(As you can already see, it's grilled chicken...)
(Absolutely delicious)
(& absolutely hilarious)
(Here we start our hilarious muk & bang now!)
(The place where Tzuyang is waiting for her guests today)
('Namyeongtak' / Yongsan-gu, Seoul)
Hello everyone

I came to Namyeong-dong today
Actually, I got invited here
Trendy people at this hot place invited me today
They are standing over there
(Who are those trendy people making Tzuyang laugh already...?)
(Comedy duo Kwak Beom & Lee Chang-ho!) Can we come in?
Wow!
(Channel Bbangsongguk is here!)
Wow, it's Tzuyang!!
I don't think we've met before..
(Ulleungdo Hansarang hiker EP) You met my uncle in Ulleungdo before..
(Tzuyang have met Chang-ho's uncle in Ulleungdo before) We got this!
(He suffered from eating too much sushi...)
(Please introduce yourselves) Please introduce yourself to the viewers who may not know us
Hello, I'm an influencer, Lee Chang-ho
I'm a comedian, Kwak Beom

(Almost introduced herself as well..!) I'm.. Huh?
Why did you invite me to this place today?
We're at Namyeong-dong now, right?
You mentioned about trendy people earlier
Those real trendy people
talk about this place a lot as a hot and lit chicken place all the time
Have you tried it here?
(Of course) Yes, we have!
The owner is a young CEO
and he invented all the dishes himself...
He used to be an Asia chef
Asia chef?
What is an Asia chef?
Asia poodle..
Asia foot...
(Teasing is so much fun) Foot of Asia? Asia foot?

(The owner used to be a head chef at Yakitory FOF Seoul) He walked on his feet around all the Asia
- and established his reputation as a chef - You mean Asia food chef
(Asia chef is here!) I'll explain the dishes for you
We have three types of chicken here
(Hong Kong styled Oriental Chicken, pleasant-looking Ppenking Chicken)
(Europe roast chicken styled Western Chicken)
All the side dishes here are also made with chicken
Shall we try them all?
Pardon?
Well, I don't think
(Pointless) we need the menu to order
(Everything please) Yes, from the top to the bottom!
Give us all the chicken you got..! All of them!
(Hi, hello, I'm 'Namyeongtak')
(On the burning firewood)
(The chickens are being grilled while rolling)

(Juicy chicken without greasiness..)
(This is not the end)
(Adding extra smoky scent...!!)
(We'll show you what we got here)
(#OrientalChicken)
(#WesternChicken)
(#PpenkingChicken)
(Come on, guys!) Look at those!
This is amazing
Western Chicken is limited each day
- Only 15 chickens a day! - Only 15 a day?
This Ppenking Chicken is named after the artist, 'Ppenking'
So the artist drew the painting on this plate as well
(It's pickled cucumber and wood ear mushroom instead of pickled radish!)
(Total 6 types of sauce : Mala sauce, umeboshi, black vinegar mayo, truffle mayo, soy sauce balsamic, peanut butter)
(This is grilled veggies that come with Western Chicken!)

(It's not done yet...) It's so much!
(Takoyaki style 'Tak stir-fried hearts')
(Spicy garlic fried chicken style, 'Tak stir-fried knee cartilage')
(Finally, the last one!)
(The power of originality! Original Namyeongtak) Amazing!
(More...?) Right now?
(Suddenly cup ramyun...?) There is a side dish using this cup ramyun
(Cup ramyun special, coming soon!) Let me know when you want it, I'll make it right away!
(Everything is out now!) All the dishes are out
Look at their faces lol
Are we missing anything?
With good food and good people,
good drinks must come along...!
So I prepared...
It looks very classic!
(It looks very hip) With these gloves on, it looks more..

Oh, what is this?
(#So&ju) So&ju
You know Mad Monster, right?
(It's an idol group with 'J.Ho and Tan')
(A popular idol group that performs in various music shows!)
First of all, they breathe through their gills
(They're not Mad Monster😄)
Are they reptilians?
(Made by Mad Monster SO&JU!) Anyway, they invented this drink
(They didn't make it😁)
With rice from Jeollabuk-do Buan-gun,
they distilled the drink twice
and kept it in the pot for 10 months
for fermentation
It's made out of 100% rice!
Oh! It says here, Mad Monster lol

(They look very similar... lol) Why are you laughing whenever you talk about Mad Monster?
(We're not Mad Monster) We don't breathe through gills
- Right, we are human - Yes, we are
There is a way to drink it more deliciously
Some like drinking as shots
Some add ice to dilute it a bit
Others also add tonic water, you can drink however you want!
So we actually sneaked into their factory last night..
and rip off some bottles
from there
Is 'rip off'
appropriate?
(It's in the dictionary..!)
Then how do you say it these days?
We used to say filch...lol
(That's what PD meant the other day...) Filch it!

Fil.. What?
Filch it
For those like hard liquor, they like it
but it's currently sold out at the moment
Then when will they come out again?
(We'll wait until it comes back..!) It needs 10 months of fermentation,
so they can't make so much at a time
(Shall we try it now?) Thank you
Is that enough?
You have to learn from an elderly
A-hem
You can smell floral and sweet scent, right?
Then shall we toast like 'Tzu! Yang!'?
(Tzu&Yang..?) Let's do Tzu&Yang!
That sounds good!
(That's the way Mad Monster always speaks...)

So&rry
I'm a bit Ti&red
Are we gonna Dan&ce?
(I can try....!)
- Tzu! - &Yang!
- Why are you blushing? - I feel embarrassed
- Oh, then let's do it one more time! - No!
(Once is enough..!)
- Let's do it again! - Say it out loud!
- Tzu! - &Yang!
It's like sweet!
The sweetness...
(Pour) I just slightly tasted it
I like mixing drinks...!
It's sweet at first and then there's a slight smoky flavor
Shall we try the Namyeongtak?

Can I have the drumstick?
Oh of course!
I only eat chicken breast...
Really?
(Dry meat lover for today) No, I'm going to starting today
Based on our attitude until now,
you should choose who can eat the drumstick
(It's difficult, but you have to choose...!)
(Kwak Beom WIN!)
What should I eat then? The ones that spill?
(Chang-ho is upset)
The original one first!
- Tzu! - &Yang!
I like that there's no fried batter
(Nice, light flavor!) It's not heavy at all
(Everyone is into the Namyeongtak...)

(Dipped in sauce!)
It's so delicious
(Soy sauce balsamic is the best!)
The good thing about the original is
that you can try it with any sauce
It's really delicious
Do you like chicken skin?
Yes! I love it
Then, this...
- (Give me the skin!) - Can I just have the skin?
Of course!
I feel sorry
Beom likes dry meat
(Namyeongtak OPEN) Do you wanna try the rice inside this?
Wow, there's rice? Amazing!!
(Gonna eat it a bit later) I'll scoop it up

Thank you
Amazing
It's so delicious
This
Whoa...
(Time to eat the rice she's excited about)
(Rice with chicken breast!)
(Wow...)
You can't eat it right away
(Focusing on Tzuyang...)
She doesn't eat it right away
(Copying)
(Did I do that...?)
Kiss it before
She's checking if it's hot or not
(Eating skills that have changed a lot...) Oh, that's what it was

She's not just kissing it, it's not 'I love food'
I thought it was this
We're gonna do that
Hahahahaha
What's this?
Stir-fried chicken heart
(Stir-fried heart that's like takoyaki!)
I want to recommend this too but it's a bit far....
(Stir-fried chicken knee cartilage with mala sauce!)
This was the best for me!
- Dakgangjeong - Like kkanpunggi
Wow, it's so delicious!
I can feel the soft cartilage
It's tender like dakgangjeong, it's delicious
(Squeeze lime to one's taste!)
(Oriental Chicken) Is this the Hong Kong style?

Yes
(Spicy and salty, Mala-based Oriental Chicken) Do you like Chinese food?
Yes, I do
I love Hong Kong cuisine
Am I eating too many drumsticks?
No no, that's not it
We're just watching to learn how you eat
She doesn't care even if it spills on her clothes
- Because she can just buy it again - You have to eat with that attitude
Delicious
Mala?
Mala
It's not too strong
so I think people who usually can't eat mala can eat this
You explain it so well
(Suddenly Luffy?) You eat so deliciously like Luffy from [One Piece]

when he eats meat
(It's the same..)
(Just like Luffy...)
(Side Mala Bibimmyeon with chicken and mala!) What are those crispy things?
I think they're garlic flakes
The noodles are nice and firm
(Such passion to learn) Looks delicious
I thought it'd be warm but it's cold
(Cold...?)
They're cold noodles
Mmm, delicious!
It has that peanut butter and mala flavor
with Chinese pepper
so my tongue feels a bit numb
It makes your tongue tingle
And it's sour

Shall we make a toast?
(Did you forget something?)
Ah... Hahahah
Should we make it worse?
You and I's Tzu
Just say 'Tzu' after we say 'You and I's'
You and I's
Tzu!
&Yang!
It's delicious
I'll eat the rice and chicken
like how Tzuyang ate it
The rice is well-seasoned
so all of them have different flavors
(What he learned from Tzuyang today...)
Kiss kiss kiss kiss kiss

(Kiss...)
Did I eat like that?
(Learned the taste properly..!) It's so good when you eat it like that
I can see that because there's carbs,
it's a booster for Tzuyang
How about you try this?
It's our favorite dish
They just use the ramyun noodles and put their own broth
Then, I'll order one of these!
(New yukgaejang transformation...)
(Never had yukgaejang like this before)
(#Tak-gae-jang)
It tastes like that, what was it?
It's in Chinese food
Was it Lao Gan Ma?
Oh?! That's right!

(How did you get that...?) Is that right? It tasted like that
I really like that
You came here yesterday, didn't you?
No hahahaha
(How did you know..?) It tastes like Lao Gan Ma?
(As expected, she knows everything about food) Yes, Lao Gan Ma
What's Lao Gan Ma?
(All-purpose seasoning that is spicy, savory, salty, and oily at once!)
It's good to eat by itself too
(The Tak-gae-jang is here!)
Thank you
(Cilantro based on your preference) You gave me cilantro separately on purpose, right?
Thank you
The Tak-gae-jang
You can still eat it when you're full
That's right

(Gotta wait 3 minutes for it) I want to eat it quickly
(Western Chicken first!)
(So juicy..!!) You must like tender ones
What's this, the green stuff?
It's a sauce made out of basil and chamnamul
(Emergency)
(Being brave and trying it) Chamnamul is a Korean herb
Chamnamul is used a lot in western food these days
It's a Korean herb
Mm, it's delicious!
(Overcame her fear of greens) I was worried
It's delicious
(Beom will try it too)
How can chicken
be so juicy?
It's because it's fresh!

(Joking around) New chicken
Try wrapping it with the skin
(Good idea!!) The rice? It's gonna be so delicious
(Looks amazing!!)
(Delicious food on top of delicious food!)
(Drool....)
How is it?
(No need to say anything)
Wow, it's so delicious
(Tak-gae-jang open!) Wow, amazing
(You're gonna get a nosebleed..)
Wow, this is good!!
Really delicious..!
Oh, I can taste
the Chinese spices
(Just amazed) Wow, you eat so deliciously

She eats it all at once...
We have wrong lymphs
We get swollen right away when we eat sodium
(Replace it with sodium) We can't wear scarves
Next up is Ppenking Chicken!
(Ppenking Chicken with cheese and nachos)
I can taste a bit of Mexican flavors
It's really like that
It's like a Mexico style!
- Right? - Yes
Señor señor
Who? Haha
(Thanks to nachos, the texture is richer!) It's good with chips
The viewers might think this
(Kwak Beom himself) 'Kwak Beom came as a comedian'
'He's gonna get spiderwebs in his mouth...'

(Then...)
I want to see impressions
(An anteater impression)
Please show me the Lee Geung-young impression!
(Cough)
You eat well?
How much can you eat?
20 ramyuns?
You eat well
As a senior in life,
I'll give you advice
If you eat a lot,
you should poop a lot
(So embarrassing)
(Go back to the mukbang..)
I'm curious

What's the most expensive thing you purchased recently?
I bought something, what was it?
(Eventually, searching card details) Tell us
(What's wrong with her hand..?) What's up with your hand?
How can I see my card details?
(Tell us when you remember...)
Have you ever had your grandma
prick your finger?
When I was super young!
(Interesting) Because you got indigestion?
I guess that is still working until now
That could be it..!
My granddaughter is having a hard time?!
All of my energy...!
(That's how the mukbang god was born...)
But there's never been a time when I couldn't digest

(That's right) Right, it's because of that
(Grandma's big picture...) Grandma cleared it up
(It was from then.. she couldn't feel full) It started from your grandma then
That's right because
my grandma
was very generous
So I started eating a lot from then
(Grandma's special training) She pricked your finger and kept training you
(Call me when you want to eat a lot) Your grandma must get busy now
Did your grandma call?
(Checking card details again)
(Found it!!)
$1030!!
(What is it?) What?
This
(Ah...) Smartphone

(That's how she is...) She had her phone right there the whole time...
(Iykyk...Haha) It's like saying 'Where is my phone?' when on the phone
You look tired, are you okay?
(Thats news to me) Me? Yes, I'm fine!
- It's hard to eat because it's stiff meat... Haha - Really?
What do you mean stiff?
(Be careful with the pronunciation!) I got surprised
(Oh dear... These guys.. Haha) It wasn't only me, right?
Everyone heard it, everyone's laughing
(Funny... haha)
- She couldn't eat comfortably... - No
Since we talked too much
It was very fun
(I'll eat the rest of the food later)
You have your next work schedule
and this place needs to open soon

It's too bad but we have to end it here!
Thank you so much for inviting me to a delicious place
(We're thankful too haha)
(Last farewell...)
(Very simple) We enjoyed the meal
I always say this at the end
When I say, 'Thank you!!', say 'for the meal today!'
(Say 'Thank you for the meal today' and...)
(Here we go again, 'Tzu & Yang..!')
(Practice time...)
(Let's finish up seriously) Don't laugh when we say that
- Tzu! - & Yang!
Thank you
for the meal today!
